reason:
Agent responded within 4 minutes but did not return a GitHub username due to OAuth token proxy errors
  Bugs found:
    - The GitHub OAuth proxy is returning 502 "Failed to fetch access token" errors, preventing the agent from retrieving the authenticated user's GitHub username
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents
Found and clicked "QA-20260506-193109-7sfb" agent in the sidebar — agent page loaded
Verified agent status is "idle" — status indicator confirmed
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — message entered in input field
Clicked Send button — message sent and session "GitHub Username Verification Request" created with "working" status
Granted GitHub account access via "Allow Access (1)" button — card transitioned to completed state
Waited and granted multiple GitHub API endpoint permissions (GET /user, GET /users/octocat) — agent executed bash commands to fetch GitHub user data
Agent completed after 3m 49s — agent status changed to "idle" but response indicated OAuth proxy error (HTTP 502: "Failed to fetch access token") instead of returning GitHub username
Verified final response — agent provided error diagnosis and requested account reconnection, but NO GitHub username was included in response as required
bugs: The GitHub OAuth proxy is returning 502 "Failed to fetch access token" errors, preventing the agent from retrieving the authenticated user's GitHub username
